title: ffi/client.rs: client_send_message sends unencrypted payloads — no MLS or HPKE layer
description: client_send_message() calls encode_chat_payload() which does serde_json + pad() and sends BROADCAST RPC with no MLS or HPKE. There is no group join flow in the FFI API (NieClient, NieEvent). Flutter users get a working-looking chat client with zero E2E encryption. The API surface has no room for encryption state. Needs to be a documented limitation or implemented before the FFI ABI is used in production.
